title: 2025 08 29 Irl Lore
html:
TL;DR

  • irl lore is Yahir's iOS journaling app concept that turns scattered daily notes into AI-coauthored "lore" — chapters, monthly wraps (Spotify-style), and paywalled prediction cards.
  • Stack: swiftui + supabase (auth/RLS/Storage) + gpt-5o-mini for daily/weekly summaries, monthly wraps, and 2–3 prediction cards/month.
  • Tone target is "warm, mystical, friend-over-tea" — explicitly not therapy, not a generic notes app; differentiates against sprawl.
  • Monetization is freemium: free tier covers capture/timeline/basic summary; paid unlocks predictions and extended history. M1→M3 milestones span 6 weeks.
  • Doc also collects a sibling concept ("Tea Time") and an unrelated cam jipp/brotein reflection — Yahir doubting Cam's drive and questioning the friend-business overlap.

Notes

The PRD is comprehensive: data models (User/Entry/Summary/Prediction/Milestone), full Supabase SQL schema with RLS policies, edge function contracts (/ai/generate-summary, /ai/generate-wrap, /ai/generate-predictions), an analytics taxonomy, and a SwiftUI tab skeleton. Onboarding goal: first entry in <60s via Apple Sign-In + FaceID lock toggle. Default nudge: 8pm local, no mornings, quiet hours after 10pm.

The "Tab 7" Cam reflection is the emotional throughline of this doc and connects to a recurring question: can cam jipp carry his weight on brotein? Yahir cites his dad's "never do business with friends/family" rule and jake holtz as a cautionary frame. He observes Cam is "result-driven not mission-driven" — the inverse of how Yahir frames his own all in disposition.

A short Tab 5 fragment narrates a kissing-by-the-fence party scene with emily stevens ("there I kissed Emily Stevens, big deal"). And Tab 8 is a Spanish for-rent ad fragment, presumably scraped from Grants Pass context.

Connections

  • that girl type app — IRL Lore appears almost verbatim there as one of several gossip-app ideations; this PRD is the "wholesome pivot" of that brainstorm
  • — IRL Lore is positioned as the antidote
  • — sibling project list

related.label: CEOs of the future — drugs, tech-literacy, and the slow slide
